videos.title: A new way to do CSS transforms!
videos.description: Demonstrates the standalone rotate property and how it simplifies rotation animations compared to transform: rotate().

videos.title: 3D CSS - lighting, animations, and more!
videos.description: In-depth exploration of 3D rotations using rotateX, rotateY, and rotateZ to build cubes and animated 3D scenes.

videos.title: Learn CSS Transform In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Covers the rotate function with transform-origin, combining rotations, and practical rotation effects.

videos.title: 3D Tilting Card Effect with Mouse Tracking // HTML, CSS & JS
videos.description: Builds a 3D tilting card that rotates based on mouse position using CSS transforms and JavaScript.
